meaning: n.阿瓦隆(凯尔特族传说中的西方乐土岛,据说亚瑟王及其部下死后尸体被移往该岛)
examples: The boat took him away to the island of Avalon, the land of heroes.
Avalon resort, in northeastern West Virginia, takes ordinary activities to a nude level.
Viking River Cruises and Avalon Waterways are some of the operators which sail the Yangtze.
Avalon Rare Metals Inc. shares are currently trading off about 6.5% on the day.
Avalon said that when they were working together, she never realized how beloved she was.
